title: Strategic Partner Manager, contract (Japan and Greater China Market)
description:
This is an 8-months contract.

Responsibilities:

Partner Management & GTM Execution

  • Support Partner Managers in developing and executing GTM plans with prioritized partners to drive adoption and growth of messaging and commerce solutions
  • Drive disciplined business planning and execution, including pipeline tracking, deal management, milestones, partner plans, and follow-ups
  • Provide ongoing partner education and enablement on the company's products and programs, particularly solutions involving APIs and advanced integrations

Partner Integration & Enablement

  • Facilitate partner onboarding and integration readiness, including trainings, product/process enablement, and day-to-day partner support
  • Help partners operationalize the company's solutions by guiding them through program requirements, workflows, and launch/scaling processes

Issue Management & Escalations

  • Track, triage, and resolve partner escalations by coordinating effectively with Product, Engineering, and Operations teams
  • Maintain clear escalation documentation, timelines, and communication to ensure timely resolution and partner satisfaction

Ecosystem Growth & Opportunity Mapping

  • Support ecosystem expansion by identifying, qualifying, and onboarding new partners where relevant, with a focus on scalable impact
  • Map ecosystem dynamics and identify emerging trends and opportunities across messaging and commerce to inform strategy and prioritization

Partner & Market Insights Feedback

  • Gather partner feedback and market insights; synthesize and communicate actionable recommendations to influence product improvements and roadmap discussions
  • Collaborate cross-functionally to translate partner needs into clear requirements, solutions, and execution plans

Program & Operational Support

  • Support partnership-related operational activities, including contracting workflows, incentives and program tracking, and launch coordination
  • Represent the team and portfolio in partner forums or industry engagements as needed

Requirements:

  • Proficiency in English, business-level Japanese and business-level Mandarin is required to effectively liaise with stakeholders in the Greater China Region and Japan to support cross-border collaboration as part of the role’s responsibilities.
  • Experience in partnerships, business development, or partner management within technology ecosystems (e.g. messaging, SaaS, cPaaS, enterprise software, commerce, ad tech, APIs)
  • Strong track record in GTM execution, partner enablement, and operational rigor, with the ability to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities
  • Proven analytical skills, with the ability to derive insights from data and apply them to partner strategy and execution
  • Demonstrated ability to collaborate cross-functionally and drive outcomes through influence

postedCompany.description: OPTIMUM SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD is Singapore-headquartered IT Outsourcing firm specialising in Software Engineering, Application Development & Support, IT Infrastructure Management. Having started in March 1997, we have grown to one of the largest IT Services firms in Singapore providing Digital Transformation Services to its clients.
